title: bronwenia longipilifera
side_effects: Bronwenia longipilifera can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. Overconsumption of the plant's extract may lead to nausea, headaches, and dizziness. In severe cases, using the plant without proper knowledge can cause liver damage, respiratory problems, and even cardiac issues. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified practitioner before using Bronwenia longipilifera for any health-related purposes.
